reference.title: Key References
reference.shortdesc: Authoritative DITA-OT documentation sources referenced throughout this handbook.

ul.li: Processing structure: temp dir, stages, intermediate artifacts
Pre-processing modules: preprocess as Ant targets
Pre-processing extension points: recommended pre/post hooks + cautions
XSLT-import extension points: installer adds imports into default code
Map-first preprocessing: preprocess2 model, HTML5 default as of 4.2, limitations
Docker usage and creating images: run builds and install plugins in images
GitHub Actions guidance and dita-ot-action repo README
Extension point reference and plug-in descriptor file docs
